cards.back: A method of evaluating projects by comparing the costs and benefits to determine whether the project is worth undertaking
The time it takes for a project to recover its initial investment through savings or earnings
A method of evaluating projects by calculating the present value of expected future cash flows and comparing them to the initial investment
A table used to evaluate alternatives by comparing their costs, benefits, and other criteria
A table used to evaluate and prioritize risks by their likelihood and impact
